task_updates.executor_notes: Added a resolver-dispatch smoke test covering family dispatch, batch duplicate-recovery response shaping, and single-vs-batch task creation response parsing. Verification: `npx tsc --noEmit` passed. Direct `vitest` execution was blocked by the workspace alias-resolution issue described above.

Ported the image-upscale task builder into the edge-function resolver registry and switched the shared image-upscale task helper onto the family request path. Verification: repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

Ported video-enhance defaults/validation/payload shaping into the edge-function resolver registry and routed the shared video-enhance helper through the family request path. Verification: repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

Ported z-image turbo i2i validation/batch expansion into the edge-function resolver registry and switched the shared batch helper to the family request path. Verification: repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

Ported magic-edit validation/defaulting/batch expansion into the edge-function resolver registry and switched the shared magic-edit batch helper to the family request path. Verification: repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

Ported masked-edit task expansion into the edge-function resolver registry and switched both the single-task and batch masked-edit helpers to the family request path. Verification: repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

Ported image-generation resolution/reference/LoRA/task-type logic into the edge-function resolver registry, including batch prompt expansion and per-task seed generation, and switched the shared batch helper to the family request path. Verification: repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

Ported join-clips orchestration payload building and server-side task contract helpers into the edge-function resolver registry and routed the shared join-clips helper through the family request path. Verification: repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

Ported individual-travel-segment routing/lookup/payload generation into the edge-function resolver registry and routed the shared segment task helper through the family request path. Verification: repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

Ported travel-between-images orchestration creation into the edge-function resolver registry, kept the client-side preparation that stays UI-owned, removed the client-side validation call, and consumed parent-generation metadata through the family request wrapper. Verification: repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

Ported crossfade-join task creation into the edge-function resolver registry and routed the shared crossfade helper through the family request path. Verification: repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

Ported edit-video-orchestrator and character-animate payload construction into edge-function resolvers and switched the remaining direct raw callers in scope onto the family request path. Verification: repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: The new smoke test file covers the resolver happy path with a minimal mocked family resolver, a batch insert path where the first insert recovers through the 23505 idempotency lookup, and client response parsing for both `{ task_id }` and `{ task_ids }`. `npx tsc --noEmit` passed. Direct `vitest` execution was blocked by the existing alias-resolution issue in this workspace.

The image-upscale resolver now owns validation/defaulting and emits the same worker-facing params shape as the previous client helper (`image_url`, lineage fields, and optional upscale controls), while the client helper now only forwards `{ family: 'image_upscale', project_id, input }`. Repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

The video-enhance resolver accepts interpolation-only, upscale-only, and combined requests, and it applies the ported FILM and FlashVSR defaults server-side (`num_frames/use_calculated_fps/video_quality` and `upscale_factor/color_fix/output_quality`). Repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

The z-image turbo i2i resolver now derives a base seed once for batched requests and emits per-task seeds as `baseSeed + index`, preserving the current client-side pattern while the client wrapper only forwards the batch request. Repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

The magic-edit resolver resolves output resolution from `context.aspectRatio` via `resolveProjectResolutionFromAspectRatio(...)` and no longer depends on the client to pre-resolve project dimensions. Repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

The masked-edit resolver expands `num_generations` into N separate queued tasks. It does not stamp an explicit seed, matching the prior client flow where each generated task was created independently and left seed selection to the worker path. Repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

The image-generation resolver uses the shared server-side resolution helper, including the 1.5x scaling path for `qwen-image`, `qwen-image-2512`, and `z-image`, handles all supported reference modes in server-side param shaping, and now emits independent per-task seeds across prompt/image batch expansion. Repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

The join-clips resolver now composes the orchestrator payload through the server-side task-contract helpers, preserving VACE defaults, phase-config handling, per-join overrides, and family/task-view/orchestration contracts in the queued payload. Repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

The individual-travel-segment resolver now calls the `ensure_shot_parent_generation` RPC when needed and resolves child generation routing through `supabaseAdmin` lookups by pair-shot-generation id first, then by child order. Repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

The travel-between-images resolver returns `meta.parentGenerationId`, the travel wrapper reads that metadata into its `parentGenerationId` result, and `generateVideoService.ts` now relies on the wrapper result after removing the client-side validation call. Repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

The crossfade-join resolver now owns the same worker-facing payload fields that the deleted client helper assembled (`travel_stitch` params, `full_orchestrator_payload`, and orchestration contract), while the shared helper only forwards the family request. Repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

Both remaining edit-video-orchestrator callers now send the same `orchestrator_details`, `tool_type`, `parent_generation_id`, and optional `based_on` data through the `edit_video_orchestrator` family request instead of raw `task_type` inserts. Repository `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.
